data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for rollback snapshot support.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the rollback snapshot support, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for rollback snapshot support, there is no direct evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of API functionality for rollback snapshot support.
